package rulecoverage

func PositiveCrc32ChecksumInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "crc32_checksum_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`crc32.Checksum...` inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
